Localization.Description: An attempt to create a user with an unencrypted password is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created a user with an unencrypted password on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to create a user with an unencrypted password on host {event_src.host}
